description: Manage GitLab projects, issues, merge requests, pipelines, repositories, and admin workflows.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint not provided and registryType='mcpb' not in the inference table)

name: io.github.jmrplens/gitlab-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: GitLab instance URL (default: https://gitlab.com; set for self-managed instances)
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_URL

environmentVariables.description: GitLab Personal Access Token (glpat-...)
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for self-signed certs (default: false)
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_SKIP_TLS_VERIFY

environmentVariables.description: Tool catalog selector: dynamic, meta, or individual (default: dynamic)
environmentVariables.name: TOOL_SURFACE

environmentVariables.description: Resource and prompt catalog selector: full or minimal (default: full)
environmentVariables.name: CAPABILITY_SURFACE

environmentVariables.description: Meta-tool input schema detail: opaque, compact, or full (default: opaque)
environmentVariables.name: META_PARAM_SCHEMA

environmentVariables.description: Enable GitLab Premium/Ultimate tools; GitLab.com Enterprise/Premium also exposes Orbit Knowledge Graph tools (default: false)
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_ENTERPRISE

environmentVariables.description: Read-only mode: disables all mutating tools (default: false)
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Safe mode: intercepts mutating tools and returns a JSON preview instead of executing (default: false)
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_SAFE_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Append EmbeddedResource content blocks (clickable links to MCP resources) to get_* tool results (default: true)
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDED_RESOURCES

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool names to exclude from registration (e.g. gitlab_admin,gitlab_runner)
environmentVariables.name: EXCLUDE_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Skip Personal Access Token scope detection and register all tools regardless of token permissions (default: false)
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_IGNORE_SCOPES

environmentVariables.description: Maximum attachment upload size in bytes or human-readable (e.g. 2GB). Default: 2147483648 (2 GB)
environmentVariables.name: UPLOAD_MAX_FILE_SIZE

environmentVariables.description: Extra OS path-list-separated directories allowed for local GitLab import archives
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_MCP_ALLOWED_IMPORT_DIRS

environmentVariables.description: Per-server tools/call rate limit in requests per second; 0 disables it (default: 0)
environmentVariables.name: RATE_LIMIT_RPS

environmentVariables.description: Token-bucket burst size when RATE_LIMIT_RPS is greater than 0 (default: 40)
environmentVariables.name: RATE_LIMIT_BURST

environmentVariables.description: Logging verbosity (default: info)
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Auto-update mode: true (auto-apply), check (log-only), false (disabled). Default: true
environmentVariables.name: AUTO_UPDATE

environmentVariables.description: GitHub repository slug for release assets (default: jmrplens/gitlab-mcp-server)
environmentVariables.name: AUTO_UPDATE_REPO

environmentVariables.description: Periodic update check interval in HTTP mode (default: 1h)
environmentVariables.name: AUTO_UPDATE_INTERVAL

environmentVariables.description: Pre-start download timeout, range 5s-10m (default: 60s)
environmentVariables.name: AUTO_UPDATE_TIMEOUT

title: GitLab MCP Server
